properties.remark: STRUCTURAL AND HOUSE DAMAGE REPORTED BY COUNTY EM IN THE WINDSOR CIRCLE AREA OF OCEAN RIDGE PLANTATION, JUST OFF OF HIGHWAY 17. PEOPLE TRAPPED IN HOMES. SEVERAL POWER LINES DOWN ALONG HIGHWAY 17, NEAR THE HIGHWAY 904 INTERSECTION IN THE GRISSETTOWN AREA.
